review_title: Helpful SEO plugin for WordPress users
description: Overall my experience is positive. It helps me keep content optimized and organized for search engines, especially on WordPress websites.
author: Roger A.
pros: I like how it guides you step by step to optimize content for SEO. The traffic light system makes it easy to understand what to improve. Also the free version provides amazing tools to be honest, it helps a lot!
cons: Some important features are only available in the paid version. Sometimes the recommendations feel too rigid.

review_title: Solid Wordpress SEO Plugin option in 2025 but look around first.
description: We used Yoast with our wordpress site for more than a year. Its always been one of the top options for SEO wordpress plugins and we had tried lower tier options beforehand. Ultimately we found it a very solid option that was edged out by competitors offering more value for money and features at a similar price point
author: Angus A.
pros: The UI is straightforward, its quite a light app and doesn't slow down my wordpress backend like some other seo plugins have.
cons: The depth of the features was not as extensive compared to alternatives and also the pricing was not as competitive.

review_title: SEO help without the stress
author: Kyshira S.
pros: Helps with SEO basics, green lights feel good, easy to follow, good for beginners
cons: Can be too picky, doesn’t always match real results, nags you a lot, premium features pushed too hard

review_title: Really easy and stands its ground.
description: It is probably the easiest SEO plugin for my clients to use.
author: Elle D.
pros: Yoast has always led the charge with intergating SEO services into a Wordpress website
cons: There are some features that Yoast charges for that others don't.

review_title: The Best SEO Plugin for Business Sites
description: Overall Yoast is the best seo tool for wordpress sites, they provide many features and is better than RM, I use Rm too but just because of pricing reasons, yoast is always my first choice for SEO, Even yoast free version is great.
author: Vikash M.
pros: They diont have so many features compared to their competetor but they have the quality, every feature they have is just too good, it fulfills all the need of SEO, with Yoast i cancelled some of external tools sub becuase it fulfilled my needs.
cons: Pricing, i only use yoast on business sites, cause its too pricy for personal blogs.

review_title: Yoast SEO - great but pricy (for WooCommerce)
description: Yoast SEO is a great plugin to manage your WordPress website, give many tools like sitemap generator and JSON schema witch really help for exposure on search engines.
author: Carly P.
pros: Really like Yoast because is simple to setup and use. It helps on optimizing the the content on every page as it gives me steps that are easy to follow and understand.
cons: The plugin costs is quite high if you want to use it with WooCommerce.

review_title: The best SEO plugin in WordPress that will do On-Page-SEO perfectly
description: My overall experience is in satisficed level with this software, It helped me a lot from all sides. It made my project much easier and effective. I was successfully able to make happy my clients with the work by using Yoast SEO plugin. Features are great, easy to use, suggests optimizing google ranking factors and that's enough for me.
author: Torikul I.
pros: This plugin is almost an all-rounder that can do everything. There are so many amazing features I noticed in this plugin which is very helpful for a website, even it's a very easy to use. For example, website submission is very easy on Google Search Console or in other webmaster tools like Bing / Yandex. Just a few clicks are able to do that process without pasting the tracking file to the public_html. This plugin shows the page or posts SEO score after adding meta tag, descriptions, keywords, alternative texts on images etc. It also suggests the improvement that the page needs to rank better on search engines. I can edit the htaccess file by using this plugin without going to the cPanel. Another awesome thing is, sitemap creation is super easy with this plugin. Have worked with Yoast SEO so many times to rank webpages on google, I really like this plugin.
cons: Yoast SEO not will allow you to check the daily or monthly visitors that the website getting. As well as there is a problem with its indexability system. I saw that some websites get SEO errors detected by the Yoast plugin. But there is no easy direction or solution, they suggest Ryte which is really confusing. I don't feel comfortable working with Ryte. Yoast plugin should remove this matter completely. There is a website indexing problem on Google. It takes a long time to Index a website page that is On-Page-SEO optimized through the Yoast SEO plugin.

review_title: Best SEO plugin for WordPress Website
description: For me, Yoast is the best plugin because it is very easy to use and has all the required features.
author: Prabhakar U.
pros: What I like the most about Yoast is that Yoast is very easy to use as compared to other WordPress plugins.
cons: It has less features than other SEO plugins. More features should be added as well.

review_title: Would Recommend
author: Abbie F.
pros: I love it. It's very user friendly and easy for people who do not have much experience or background with SEO.
cons: Sometimes it's really finicky to figure out run on sentences and how to get all the post in the green color.

review_title: Yoast SEO - rank higher
description: Yoast SEO is a indispensable plugin, it helps a lot with on-page SEO optimization, sitemaps and JSON Schema. The plugin is well build as I never had any compatibility issues with any other plugins and or themes.
author: Lucie E.
pros: The setup of the plugin was straightforward and is well documented. Optimization tips for each page or article is an important feature that I like and use for on-page SEO optimization.
cons: WooCommerce needs another module bought and install, is not integrated in the original plugin.

review_title: Yoast SEO- is good but not best
description: Yoast SEO has good thing and bad things but overall is a great WordPress plugin to manage on page SEO. Is somehow compatible with WooCommerce and all WordPress themes.
author: Jordan K.
pros: An almost full comprehensive SEO plugin for WordPress. Is very easy to setup and use and very helpful as gives you guides to optimize each page or blog article for maximum on page optimization.
cons: The most annoying thing for me is that does not support WooCommerce without an addon.

review_title: Yoast SEO
description: Yoast is a well made SEO plugin for Wordpress, is well optimized and fast. If you configure it the writght way you will see some great results on your website traffic.
author: Lee W.
pros: I have used Yoast for some time now and I saw growth in the organic traffic. It helps with on-page SEO optimization giving recommendations and tips. The plugin has a nice UI and is easy to use.
cons: The need for extra addons for WooCommerce is a con.

review_title: Yoast SEO is good for beginners but provide limited features in free
description: This SEO plugin helps me to calculate the overall quality of the page, and I can optimize many things, but free features are limited.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It helps me to optimize keywords and give suggestions for optimizing the content on a page based on a target keyword.It analyzes the content on a page and provides suggestions for making it more readable and engaging for users.It generates a sitemap automatically. You can also verify your search console, bing, by adding code on the Yoast plugin.Yoast SEO includes tools for optimizing content for social media sharing.I can optimize or customize my URL structure. And also index or deindex things easily.It provides insights into the overall quality of a page's content, making it easier to identify areas for improvement. This is the main feature.
cons: I noted that its suggestions and analysis can be overly prescriptive and that there are limited options for customizing the plugin to fit their specific needs. You can't use it with some other plugins like schema generator.It offers a free version which is limited but good for beginners, but its paid version is expensive in comparison to other SEO plugins.

review_title: Yoast will help you to apply SEO elements in your site
description: I a good SEO tool for new websites, it let you start working for free with a good value.
author: Eldar P.
pros: 1. Easy to set up and have general automatic SEO settings for every site page.2. Its scan your site pages and give them SEO score and insights, what is good and what you have to fix.3. Can be used to create a site and provide it to Google.4. Can be used to hide some pages from the search engines.
cons: 1. I didn't find the pro version with enough value compared to the free version except for the option to add keywords to your pages, also I know more SEO tools and free plugins that let you do it.

review_title: Perfect with WordPress
description: I like it, I find it simple and intuitive. Sometimes, however, the stringency of some parameters that indicate non-existent problems should be reviewed.
author: Andrea T.
pros: I use it daily. It allows me to better index all the web contents of the company I work for. The features are different, perfectly integrated into the administration panel of the page/post.
cons: Sometimes the software doesn't recognize when a page is built the way it does for a certain reason and reports non-existent errors.

review_title: An Absolute Essential
description: Overall, YoastSEO is an incredible tool and one that my team and I couldn't do without. Do yourself a favor and check it out.
author: Cole P.
pros: Yoast SEO has changed the game for our agency. I primarily work within our clients websites on their blogs and pages, and having Yoast as a tool in our roster makes my life much easier. The ability to add keywords, related keywords, and update all critical information within one place makes Yoast a must have for all SEOs and marketers.
cons: There's not much I dislike about Yoast, if I had to name one thing, it would be the way that it works with websites that have Elementor. It's difficult to identify readability issues within the text.

review_title: One of the best wordpress SEO plugins
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Al most all functionalities are free. Very useful features to optimize your blog
cons: It offer too much option, so you will need to learn how to use it

review_title: Overall Best and Professional WordPress SEO Plugin
description: I can see a very big improvement of the users on my websites after using this plugin. I have edited all the previous pages content according to the Yoast SEO recommendations, and now I always add proper SEO options in my posts, pages and products.
author: Adnan H.
pros: Yoast SEO is the best and amazing WordPress plugin, there are a lot of SEO features you can apply after the installation and activation of this plugin in your Website. If you want to see high rankings for your website content in the search engine then always use Yoast SEO. Because It will allow you to add title, description and other SEO features according to the search engines requirements.
cons: Sometimes the improvement of the posts and pages readability is quite difficult for the beginners, but according to my experience, after using the plugin for few days anyone can also do this. So all other features are amazing and nice.

review_title: Yoast was my go to
description: Overall it was better than nothing, and honestly had it not been for other new to the market plugins that were better, I would most likely be still using it. Yoast was for my company a great option for getting clients to look into their organic website traffic.
author: Rosie H.
pros: When I used yoast, it was about the only recommended SEO plugin on the market. It did the job but it was very limited on the free version and was constantly prompting you to get the paid version. I have to say that it did its job and helped with some of the SEO needed to get a site in better shape than having no tools at all.
cons: The biggest negative was how "heavy" it was considering it was not the full version of the plugin. It also left out some really vital components of basic SEO, which was justified by the fact that we were using the free version.

review_title: Very Useful
description: I really enjoy the product, will continue to use it and recommend it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how it scans the page and gives you feedback on its quality for ranking and how it allows you to create meta titles and descriptions for each page. Great for SEO!
cons: I do wish it offered more in-depth schema markup capabilities.

review_title: Online Business has no future without SEO
description: I am using Yoast SEO plugin for checking the SEO of my content and optimizing content according to its suggestion. Without the plugin, it takes lots of time and effort to create optimized content that will rank on google search.
author: Hari B.
pros: SEO and readability checker is the best thing that I like about the Yoast SEO plugin. It is suitable for any templates like eCommerce, blog, or portfolio and easily sync with our data and gives appropriate suggestion for better ranking of our articles.
cons: While checking SEO, it focuses on exact keywords only and ignores the LSI keyword, which something leads us to over-optimize of our content.

review_title: Increase SEO in Different Search Engines
description: My overall experience with Yoast SEO is very professional because I have taught this Plugin to my WordPress students in the United Arab Emirates.
author: Umair B.
pros: Good ranking in the search engines is the need of Marketing and Optimization. This is only possible just because of the Yoast SEO. Because this plugin gives you so many incredible features regarding search engine optimization. You can check the SEO score of your web pages.
cons: According to my point of view, when a plugin allows you to make your SEO better, then how you can find any cons or issues in it. Because there are no cons, therefore Yoast SEO is awesome.

review_title: Best SEO companion since I started my digital journey
description: It helps me to understand the holistic vision of SERP ranking factors and gives appropriate suggestions to stand on top in this competitive digital world.
author: Sagar K.
pros: It gives regular updates according to new updates in search engine algorithms which makes us tension free about any changes in ranking factors by search engines.
cons: We must be wise while using it because it suggests the exact keyword that we use as a focus keyword, which leads to the keyword being over-optimized.

review_title: Increase Ranking of your Website with Yoast SEO
description: I started using Yoast SEO a few years ago and I found it so incredible when I saw the ranking of my website after few days. Because I saw a major change of traffic on my website. Therefore I really like this WordPress Plugin and I am satisfied with the performance of my websites now.
author: Haris M.
pros: You can use Yoast SEO without having to worry even if you have less knowledge of SEO. Because when you are adding a page or post, you can see below a SEO box, where you can add Title and Description. When you focus a single keyword, it also tells you where and how many times in your paragraphs you should use this keyword.
cons: As a professional SEO plugin, we can find each and everything in this Plugin. According to my search engine optimization experience, I never found any cons in this amazing plugin. I think it's perfect.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: When you are unsure
description: More people see my pages and post.
author: Bruce H.
pros: Guides you by the hand to mold your listing into an better post or page. Great explanation about what Yoast recommends and why you should spend time to complete the task.
cons: would be nice to pull last 30 days of search console results and chart activity after changes suggested by Yoast.
